message:
feat(cli): enhance show/blocked/ready/stats with routing support and richer output

Major command enhancements:
- show: Support cross-project routing via RoutedIssueBatch, aggregate
  results across multiple beads directories for JSON/TOON output,
  add last-touched fallback when no IDs provided
- blocked: Add execute_with_storage_ctx for routed dispatch, expand
  JSON output with blocker details and dependency metadata
- ready: Add execute_with_storage_ctx for routed dispatch, include
  dependency count and blocker information in output
- agents: Expand AGENTS.md template generation with updated workflow
  instructions, bv integration docs, and session protocol
- stats: Add detailed breakdown by status/priority/type, dependency
  graph statistics, and stale issue detection
- changelog: Enhance changelog generation with date range filtering,
  grouping by type, and markdown output formatting
- orphans: Add JSON output mode and expand orphan detection criteria
- update: Add bulk update support and field-level validation
- create: Improve default handling and validation messages
- count: Add execute_with_storage for direct storage access
- list: Add execute_with_storage for direct storage access
- mod.rs: Minor CLI argument adjustments

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
